---

title: "Unfollow a player"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Unfollow a player"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user/players/{id}/unfollow"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the specified player from the current user's following list.

  as={"h2"}
